nasb.text: “You shall not pervert the justice due an alien or  an orphan, nor take a widow’s garment in pledge.

esv.text: “You shall not pervert the justice due to the sojourner or to the fatherless, or take a widow’s garment in pledge,

cnv.text: “你不可向寄居的和孤兒屈枉正直，也不可拿寡婦的衣服作抵押。

ccb.text: “你们要公正地对待寄居者和孤儿，不可拿寡妇的衣物作抵押。
